559 VA05B VA05B_ADL_PC (VA05B) ADL Functional Potential Care Planning Decision CHAR 1 RAP summary: ADL functional/rehabilitation potential - proceed with care. 0 = Not Triggered, 1 = Triggered, "-" = Determination precluded by missing data.
